sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103890" key="tiarafo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τῐᾱραφόρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n103890.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wearing a tiara</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:26:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26.7</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τιαροφόρος</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
